name: Crockpot Old Fashioned Vegetable Beef Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beef short ribs (trimmed of all visible fat)
1 pound can whole kernel corn, undrained
1 pound can diced tomatoes and juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef short ribs, water, salt, celery salt, chopped onion, diced carrots, and celery in a crock pot.
2. Cover; cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.
3. Debone the meat and cut into bite-sized pieces, adding them back to the pot.
4. Add the diced potatoes, corn, and diced tomatoes with juice.
5. Cover and cook on high for 2 to 3 hours.
6. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
